feedback.text: I would like to ask for you to consider adding video game protection under the Digital Fairness Act. Nowadays it's an importent piece of culture and many games that have been legally purchased by consumers have been destroyed in one way or another. To give an example, I will never again be able to play Hex: Shards of Fate, maybe the game wasn't the best, but it was something I loved, and now it's gone forever with no chance of getting it back.
